pi_items.source: NIH Clinical Tables ICD-10-CM API (Z88.0 = Allergy status to penicillin)
trytond_health source code (health.py fields.Selection mapping 'da' to 'Drug Allergy')
trytond_health source code (health.py fields.Selection mapping '3_sv' to 'Severe')

privileged_info_summary: I have audited the GNU Health task and confirmed that it uses a synthetic demo database (health50). I verified that the patient 'Ana Betz' exists in the database. Furthermore, I validated that the ICD-10-CM code 'Z88.0' correctly corresponds to 'Allergy status to penicillin', and confirmed from the Tryton health module source code that the internal system mappings for 'Drug Allergy' and 'Severe' are 'da' and '3_sv' respectively. All metadata parameters accurately match the expected backend values.
